title: Christmas Iron Chests
description: Changes the textures of modded chests to Christmas
body:
This resource pack changes textures from [Iron Chests](https://modrinth.com/mod/iron-chests) to Christmas!🎄

ㅤ
![New Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d566b2b21ff9303a50c6579ad20ffbb976ca415f.png)
ㅤ

It doesn't affect vanilla chests. If you want a resource pack that does this regardless of date, you'll need another one.

Merry Christmas and Happy New Year!🎅
